description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Content updated (June 25, 2026)

On Sunday, August 2, 2026 (Reiwa 8), 10:30 a.m.–4:00 p.m., "Minka-tsu Summer 2026" will be held at Hanno City Civic Activity Center.

【Multipurpose Hall • Reservation required • Free】
• Yakult Healthy Stomach Class: 11:00–11:40 a.m.
• Tai Chi Experience: 1:30–2:30 p.m.
• Chair Exercises & Gentle Strength Training Experience: 2:40–3:30 p.m.
For workshop participants: wear comfortable clothing and shoes, bring a face towel and a drink. Sign up by phone (978-7551) with the Civic Activity Center between July 10 (Friday) and July 25 (Saturday).

【Gallery • No reservation needed • Free】10:30 a.m.–3:30 p.m.
Health checks (body composition, blood pressure, bone density, grip strength), nutrition consultation, food-related exhibits and workshops.

【Community Square • No reservation needed • Material fee required】10:30 a.m.–3:30 p.m.
Pressed flower artwork (100–500 yen), reed blind coasters and tapestry making (100 yen), eco-craft small storage boxes (500 yen), bargain sales, baked goods and handcraft sales.

【Meeting Room • No reservation needed • Free】
Picture book storytelling sessions: morning 11:00 a.m.–12:00 p.m., afternoon 2:00–3:00 p.m.

Separately, on Saturday, August 8, 2026, at 1:30 p.m. in the Multipurpose Hall, the "13th Foreign Residents Japanese Speech Presentation" will be held. Attendance is open to all.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/jitishinkoka/shiminkatudou/10072.html
